title: Pasabahce Aware Tincan Recycled Glass Mugs - 400ml - Green - Pack of 2 - Drinking Glasses with Handles Dishwasher Safe Tumbler Cups for Drinking Water, Juice
features: Sustainable and Eco-Friendly: Made from 100% recycled glass, the Aware collection reflects Pasabahce's commitment to sustainability, helping reduce waste and support a cleaner future for our forests, oceans, and communities.

Recycled Glass Craftsmanship: Each Tincan mug is carefully crafted from multiple recycled glasses, giving new life to discarded materials while lowering the carbon footprint, all without sacrificing durability or performance.
Industrial-Inspired Design: The Tincan collection features a unique design inspired by classic soup cans and tomato tins, adding a trendy, industrial touch to your home or café decor.

Generous 400ml Capacity: With a 400ml capacity, these mugs are perfect for enjoying indulgent servings of cappuccinos, lattes, and tea infusions, and also work great as tankards for beer, cider, or lager.

Versatile and Stylish: Combining eco-conscious design with functionality, the Tincan mugs are ideal for any occasion, whether you're sipping a hot beverage or enjoying your favorite cold drink in a stylish, sustainable way.
description: Taking inspiration from the iridescent greens and blues of Turkey's Bosphorus Strait, the 100% Recycled Aware glassware collection showcases Pasabahce's dedication to sustainable living, supporting a cleaner future for forests, oceans, and communities. Each Tincan mug is created from multiple recycled glasses, breathing new life into old items while reducing waste and leaving a smaller carbon footprint—without compromising on quality or performance. The Tincan collection pairs this eco-friendly construction with a unique design inspired by classic soup cans and tomato tins, adding a cool industrial edge to any interior. With a 400ml capacity, these mugs are perfect for decadent servings of hot cappuccinos, lattes, or tea infusions, and even work as a tankard for your favorite beer, lager, or cider.
